&CONTROL
 calculation = 'relax'
 forc_conv_thr = 5.0d-4
 nstep = 100
 outdir = './output/'
 prefix = 'oh'
 pseudo_dir = '/home/node1/PSP/PseudosP/pslibrary-master/pbe/PSEUDOPOTENTIALS/'
 restart_mode = 'from_scratch'
 tprnfor = .true.
 verbosity = 'high'
 wf_collect = .true.
/

&SYSTEM
 ibrav = 0
 nat = 2
 ntyp = 2

 ecutwfc = 50
 ecutrho = 400

 occupations = 'smearing'
 smearing    = 'mv'
 degauss     = 0.01

 nspin = 1
 !tot_magnetization = 1

 nosym = .true.
 noinv = .false.
 noncolin = .false.

 vdw_corr = 'grimme-d3'
/

&ELECTRONS
 conv_thr = 1.0d-7
 electron_maxstep = 150
 mixing_beta = 0.10
 mixing_mode = 'plain'
 scf_must_converge = .true.
 startingwfc = 'random'
/

&IONS
 ion_dynamics = 'bfgs'
 upscale = 100
/
